parameters.query: ={{ `WITH cfg AS ( SELECT NULLIF('${$env.GRIST_ZEPHYR_PARENT_FOLDER_ID || ''}', '') AS root_id ), root AS ( SELECT f.folder_path FROM folders f, cfg WHERE f.folder_id = cfg.root_id ) SELECT f.folder_id, f.folder_name, f.folder_path, m.grist_doc_id, COALESCE(m.grist_table_id, 'Table1') AS grist_table_id FROM folders f LEFT JOIN grist_folder_docs m ON m.folder_id = f.folder_id WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_runs r WHERE r.folder_id = f.folder_id) AND ( (SELECT root_id FROM cfg) IS NULL OR ( (SELECT folder_path FROM root) IS NOT NULL AND f.folder_path LIKE ((SELECT folder_path FROM root) || '/%') ) ) ORDER BY f.folder_name;` }}

={{ `SELECT '${$json.grist_doc_id}' AS grist_doc_id, '${$json.grist_table_id}' AS grist_table_id, ru.folder_id, ru.run_name AS cycle_name, tr.test_case_name, tr.test_result_id, ''::text AS objective, COALESCE(tr.desired_status_id, '') AS desired_status_id, COALESCE(tr.desired_comment, '') AS desired_comment FROM test_results tr JOIN test_runs ru ON ru.test_run_id = tr.test_run_id WHERE ru.folder_id = '${$json.folder_id}' ORDER BY ru.run_name, tr.test_case_name;` }}
